headline: Will General Dynamics (GD) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: General Dynamics (GD) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights GE Aerospace, RTX and General Dynamics
summary: Aerospace-defense demand is supported by rising defense spending and aviation growth, with GE, RTX and GD highlighted for industry tailwinds.
